company.name: MarkOS
company.mission: Structure and define marketing operative systems — enabling any team to execute AI-powered marketing with the discipline of a seasoned marketing operator.
company.tone_of_voice: Expert and Authoritative — direct, systems-first, practitioner-grade. Formal in documentation, casual-technical on social. Never generic, never hyped.
taglines: Structure your marketing brain. Execute with any AI.
The Marketing OS for teams that build with AI.

product.name: MarkOS
product.distribution: npx install — one command to full scaffold
product.primary_benefit: Transforms scattered AI prompts and disconnected tools into a structured, agent-ready marketing intelligence system — installed in 60 seconds, built to scale.
top_features: MIR (Marketing Intelligence Repository) — 78-file structured brand and strategy intelligence architecture
MSP (Marketing Strategy Plan) — 80-file tactical execution blueprints for all 10 marketing disciplines
Gate system (Gate 1 + Gate 2) — progressive validation gates that unlock execution capabilities
Multi-LLM adapter — OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama with graceful fallback
Override resolution system — client overrides in .mgsd-local/ without modifying base templates
Vector memory via ChromaDB for episodic learning and RAG
Winners catalog for anchoring new assets to historical high-performers
product.price_free: $0 — user supplies own API keys; MarkOS provides the architecture
product.price_paid: TBD — to be set after first 10 pilot conversations
constraints: Legal review required before enterprise sales

audience.primary_icp: AI-ready technical founder or solo operator (1-person team, pre-revenue to early revenue, VS Code + AI tools in stack)
audience.segment_name: Developer-Adjacent Founders and AI-Forward Technical Operators
audience.job_title: Founder / Co-founder / Indie Hacker / Technical Marketing Lead
pain_points: AI tools keep generating generic outputs that don't reflect brand voice
No structured marketing system — scattered prompts, scattered tools
Wasted hours on marketing that doesn't compound
Can't scale marketing without hiring — no budget for a marketing team
Onboarded 3+ AI tools and still getting inconsistent outputs
audience.online_hangouts: X/Twitter developer community, GitHub, Reddit (r/SideProject, r/entrepreneur, r/LocalLLaMA), Hacker News
audience.buying_trigger: Failed DIY AI marketing experiment — shipped a product and got silence, or realized AI-generated content doesn't reflect actual brand identity
audience.vocabulary: system, architecture, protocol, framework, pipeline, structured, versioned, auditable, agent, context, intelligence layer
audience.vocabulary_avoids: viral, game-changing, revolutionary, effortless, magic, AI-powered (generic), simple

market.biggest_trend: AI agent proliferation creates coordination problem — every team has multiple AI tools with no shared intelligence layer. MarkOS is the picks-and-shovels infrastructure play.
market.timing: Window for category creation open now (2024-2025)

competitive.positioning_gap: No competitor has a structured intelligence architecture separating brand intelligence from execution. No competitor is developer-native (CLI install, local-first, open). No competitor owns the 'Marketing OS' category language.
primary_differentiators: MIR/MSP architecture — structured intelligence vs. execution separation
Protocol, not SaaS — installs alongside existing stack, no lock-in

goals.nyquist_install_threshold: ≥30 installs in month 1 or pivot signal

metadata.note: Populated via structured questionnaire intake — onboarding server could not run due to environment constraints. Update completeness_score to 100 when paid_ads section is populated.
